primary_naics.label: All Other Miscellaneous Chemical Product and Preparation Manufacturing

description: e-lyte innovations gmbh, dba e-lyte, is a german chemical manufacturer and research company specializing in the development, production, and testing of electrolyte solutions for energy storage technologies. the company provides services including electrolyte development, analytical testing, benchmarking studies, compatibility testing, and electrochemical evaluation of new electrolyte components. e-lyte serves a global market, focusing on lithium-ion, sodium-ion, and next-generation battery systems, as well as supercapacitors. its operations include chemical manufacturing, cell testing, and postmortem analysis, and the company is involved in research projects related to energy storage technologies. e-lyte's products are distributed across the european union and are manufactured in germany.
industry_name: All Other Miscellaneous Chemical Product and Preparation Manufacturing

description: sichuan wanbang shenghui new energy technology co., ltd. (四川万邦胜辉新能源科技有限公司), dba wanbang new energy (万邦新能源), is a chinese manufacturing company specialized in the research, development, and production of energy new materials, with a focus on solid-state batteries and related materials. the company serves primarily the chinese market, providing products and services to clients in the energy and new materials sectors. in addition to manufacturing, it operates research and production facilities and engages in technology transfer through partnerships with educational institutions and industrial enterprises.

solid power inc., dba solid power, is an american company specialized in the development of all-solid-state battery technology. the company provides battery cell technology to partners and sells sulfide solid electrolytes to companies seeking to transition to solid-state batteries. solid power operates pilot production and ev cell manufacturing lines in colorado, as well as facilities for electrolyte manufacturing, cell testing, and research and development. the company serves automakers and is publicly traded.

nextech batteries, inc. is an american private company engaged in the development and commercialization of lithium-sulfur battery technology. the company operates in the electrical and electronic manufacturing sector, focusing on lithium-sulfur batteries and energy storage solutions for applications in vehicle electrification, consumer electronics, and renewable energy storage. nextech batteries also conducts research and development in solid-state electrolyte formulations, coated separators, active materials, cathode systems, and battery management systems. the company is certified for sustainable manufacturing practices and emphasizes the use of recyclable materials and carbon-neutral processes.
core_offerings: Active Material and Cathode System Development

primary_naics.label: All Other Miscellaneous Electrical Equipment and Component Manufacturing

description: blue new energy technology (zhejiang) co., ltd. (蓝廷新能源科技（浙江）有限公司), dba blue new energy technology (蓝廷新能源科技), is a chinese manufacturing company specialized in the production of lithium-ion battery key materials, including composite separator films and solid electrolytes. the company also manufactures active functional materials and water-based adhesive agents, with proprietary formulations developed in-house. blue new energy technology serves the lithium-ion battery industry and operates as a platform for the industrialization of its research outcomes, collaborating with academic and industrial partners.
core_offerings: Lithium-Ion Battery Technology Research and Development
industry_name: All Other Miscellaneous Electrical Equipment and Component Manufacturing

primary_naics.label: All Other Miscellaneous Electrical Equipment and Component Manufacturing

description: shenzhen shenzhen special economic zone gutai battery technology co., ltd. (深圳深汕特别合作区固泰电池技术有限公司), dba gutai battery technology (固泰电池技术), is a chinese company specialized in the research, development, and industrialization of solid-state battery key materials, with a focus on solid-state electrolytes for lithium-ion and sodium batteries. the company also develops related technologies such as li-rich lithium manganate preparation and high-voltage nickel-manganese binary material preparation. it operates a comprehensive new material research and experimental facility in shenzhen, china, and primarily serves the national market.
core_offerings: Solid-State Battery Material Research and Development
industry_name: All Other Miscellaneous Electrical Equipment and Component Manufacturing

description: xinyang technology co., ltd. (芯量科技股份有限公司), known as solidedge solution, is a taiwanese company engaged in the development and manufacturing of solid-state lithium battery materials and components. the company operates as both a manufacturer and developer, providing in-house production of cathodes, anodes, and electrolytes, as well as integrated solutions that include material development and cell integration technologies. solidedge solution serves the automotive and energy sectors, with a focus on lightweight, flexible, and high-energy density battery technologies, and collaborates with industry and academic partners to advance battery materials and technologies.

poly energy is a hong kong company specialized in the development and commercialization of energy storage solutions, with a focus on all-solid-state batteries and polymer-based solid-state electrolytes. the company serves markets including consumer electronics, automotive batteries, drones, electric vehicles, aerospace, and other sectors. its operations include the production of polymer electrolytes, composite lfp cathodes, and lithium metal anodes, with a technology roadmap aimed at addressing the limitations of lithium-ion batteries.
core_offerings: Wet-chemistry Process Development for Battery Materials
Solid-State Battery Materials Research and Development

description: guangzhou youngy energy technology co., ltd, dba rjetech, is a chinese manufacturer specialized in energy storage products. the company operates as a vertically integrated manufacturer, with activities in lithium mining, production of cathode and anode materials, battery cells, modules, and dc blocks. rjetech also develops self-developed battery management systems and provides expertise in electric vehicle batteries and anode materials.

sili energy co., ltd. (주식회사 시리에너지) is a south korean company engaged in the development and manufacturing of secondary battery cathode materials, including silicon and lithium-based cathode materials, and solid-state battery materials. the company operates as both a manufacturer and service provider in the energy and battery technology industry, with a focus on the automotive sector, particularly electric vehicles. sili energy also provides material evaluation and technical consulting services, and is involved in lithium recycling and cost reduction initiatives. the company maintains a dedicated r&d campus and laboratory.

hisun new energy materials ltd. co., dba hisun, is a united states company specialized in new energy battery materials, including electrolytes for lithium and sodium ion batteries, silicon carbon anode materials, raw materials, special additives, sodium-ion battery electrolytes, and solid electrolytes. the company serves a range of industries such as digital, power, energy storage, emergency start, unmanned aerial vehicle, model aircraft, electronic cigarette, and electric tool sectors. hisun also operates as a manufacturer and distributor of materials for new energy applications, and maintains a technology innovation platform to support its research and development activities.
core_offerings: New Energy Battery Materials Research and Development

description: ningbo rongbai new energy technology co., ltd., dba rongbai lithium battery (容百锂电), is a chinese technology company specialized in the research, development, production, and sales of lithium battery cathode materials. the company serves both domestic and international battery manufacturers and operates as a multinational group with subsidiaries in china, hubei, guizhou, and korea. it is also engaged in scientific research and maintains a provincial-level research center and postdoctoral workstation.
core_offerings: Lithium Battery Cathode Materials Sales and Distribution
Lithium Battery Cathode Material Application Consulting

description: rustor llc (ооо «рустор») is a russian company engaged in the development and production of cathode materials based on complex oxides of lithium, nickel, manganese, and cobalt for lithium-ion battery applications. the company also conducts research and development in the lithium-ion battery industry and serves as both a manufacturer and supplier of cathode materials to the lithium-ion battery manufacturing sector, primarily targeting clients in the energy storage market.
core_offerings: Custom Lithium-Ion Battery Cathode Material Development
Lithium-Ion Battery Cathode Material Sales and Distribution
Lithium-Ion Battery Cathode Material Research and Development

description: feovaenergy is a singaporean company specialized in lithium battery materials, with a focus on cathode and anode production technology, lithium carbonate, and lithium hydroxide. the company serves a global market, providing products such as cathode and anode materials, electrolyte solvents, and basic lithium salts, and offers technical consulting services for lithium-ion and sodium-ion battery applications. feovaenergy is also involved in sustainability and environmental protection initiatives within the new energy battery industry.
core_offerings: New Energy Industry Technical Consulting Services

description: li hongte new energy materials co., ltd. (陕西力宏特新能源材料有限公司), dba li hongte (力宏特), is a chinese company specialized in the research, development, production, and sales of lithium-ion battery cathode materials, with a focus on lithium iron phosphate (lfp) and ternary materials. the company primarily serves the energy storage and electric vehicle industries, supplying lithium iron phosphate cathode materials for battery manufacturing. it also operates a research institute and technical department dedicated to developing new technologies, processes, and materials, and maintains a quality control system for process data tracking and early warning systems for battery batches.
core_offerings: Lithium Iron Phosphate Cathode Material Manufacturing
Lithium-Ion Battery Cathode Material Research and Development
Lithium-Ion Battery Cathode Material Sales and Distribution

description: altmin private limited is an indian private company engaged in the development and manufacturing of battery materials and cell engineering for the lithium-ion battery and electric vehicle sectors. the company produces cathode and anode materials, including lfp, lmfp, and lto chemistries, and operates a cathode gigafactory in telangana. altmin also manages partnerships with mines in south america to support its supply chain and provides chemical manufacturing services.
core_offerings: Mining and Metals Supply Chain Solutions

description: guangdong dongdao new energy co., ltd. (广东东岛新能源股份有限公司) is a chinese company engaged in the research, development, production, and sales of lithium-ion battery anode materials and electrolytes, with a focus on spherical and natural graphite anode materials. the company also operates as a manufacturer of artificial and natural graphite for electric vehicles, plug-in hybrid electric vehicles, energy storage systems, and 3c batteries. dongdao new energy is certified in environmental management, quality management, occupational health and safety management, and automotive quality management, and collaborates with research institutions to advance its technology. the company serves clients in the lithium battery industry and related sectors globally.
core_offerings: Battery Material Technology Innovation and Patent Development
Lithium-Ion Battery Material Research and Development
Battery Material Standards Development and Leadership
Lithium-Ion Battery Material Sales and Distribution

description: guangzhou rongjie energy technology co., ltd., dba rjetech, is a chinese company specialized in the research and development, production, and sales of battery cells and systems for energy storage and electric vehicles. the company manufactures lithium battery and energy storage equipment, as well as lithium battery cathode materials, and also engages in lithium battery recycling and reuse. rjetech serves a range of markets, including generation-side, grid-side, consumption-side, residential, and electric vehicle sectors, and is part of a larger group with operations spanning lithium battery manufacturing, energy storage solutions, and related resource-materials-product-application-recycling activities.

east saint先行 (亿博电竞东圣先行) is a chinese high-tech enterprise engaged in the research, development, production, sales, and service of lithium-ion battery cathode materials, electric vehicle battery packs, and energy storage battery packs. the company focuses on lithium-ion battery cathode materials such as cobalt lithium, ternary materials, and lithium iron phosphate. it operates a research institute affiliated with peking university's college of chemistry and maintains international offices in shenzhen and beijing. east saint先行 is certified as a beijing high-tech enterprise and designated as a beijing new material center for phosphoric iron lithium.
core_offerings: Lithium-Ion Battery Cathode Material Research and Development
Energy Storage Battery Pack Sales and Distribution
Lithium-Ion Battery Cathode Material Sales and Distribution
Electric Vehicle Battery Pack Sales and Distribution

description: hunan yide new energy technology co., ltd. (湖南亿德新能源科技有限公司), dba yide new energy (亿德新能源), is a chinese technology company specialized in the research and production of lithium-ion battery anode materials. the company serves the automotive, energy storage, and consumer electronics sectors, supplying products for electric vehicles, energy storage, and 3c digital products. its operations include manufacturing and development of anode materials and battery technologies.

guangdong polyentech co., ltd, dba polyentech, is a chinese company specialized in the research, development, production, and sales of new battery materials and solid-state batteries. the company serves markets including new energy vehicles, aerospace, intelligent electronic devices, and energy storage systems, and manufactures solid-state electrolytes for lithium and sodium batteries, li-rich mn-based cathode materials, and solid-state energy storage systems. polyentech also develops technologies for home energy storage, engineering vehicle battery packs, high-speed motorcycle battery packs, power station backup battery packs, wall-mounted home energy storage, marine battery packs, and fully electric energy storage systems.
core_offerings: Power Station Backup Battery Pack Manufacturing
Fully Electric Energy Storage System Manufacturing

description: btr new material group co., ltd., dba btr new material group, is a chinese manufacturer specialized in the production and sales of cathode and anode materials for lithium-ion batteries. the company operates as a high-tech enterprise that integrates research and development, manufacturing, and sales, and is affiliated with china baoan group co., ltd. btr new material group serves global markets and is a leader in the lithium-ion battery anode materials industry, with a focus on silicon-based anodes and large-scale production of high nickel cathode material nca in china.
core_offerings: Lithium-Ion Battery Material Research and Development
Lithium-Ion Battery Material Sales and Distribution

description: zhejiang shengmei lithium battery materials co., ltd., dba zhejiang shengmei lithium battery materials, is a chinese manufacturing company specialized in the production of lithium bis(fluorosulfonyl)imide, an electrolyte additive for lithium-ion batteries. the company operates a large-scale production facility and utilizes multiple patented technologies in its manufacturing processes. its products are used in the lithium-ion battery industry.
core_offerings: Lithium Battery Material Research and Development
Lithium Battery Material Quality Assurance Services

core_offerings: Lithium-Ion Battery Cathode Material Research and Development
New Energy Vehicle Battery Material Supply
Lithium-Ion Battery Cathode Material Sales and Distribution

description: nanjing blue solid new energy co., ltd. (蓝固（常州）新能源有限公司), dba nanjing blue solid new energy (蓝固新能源), is a chinese company specialized in the production and wholesale supply of solid-state electrolytes, hybrid solid-liquid electrolytes, lithium-ion battery electrolytes, sodium-ion battery electrolytes, and customized electrolytes for various battery types. the company serves the energy storage and power generation sectors, supplying products to a broad market through its subsidiaries in jiangsu, zibo, and huzhou. nanjing blue solid new energy is certified to national safety standards and collaborates with professional fire rescue teams to enhance workplace safety.

charge cccv, also known as c4v, is an american intellectual property company engaged in lithium-ion battery composition and manufacture, with a focus on next-generation battery technologies. the company develops cobalt and nickel-free cathode chemistries and solid-state and semi-solid-state battery technologies, serving applications in electric mobility, aviation, grid storage, and space exploration. charge cccv emphasizes sustainability and environmentally friendly materials and processes in its operations.

nuvvon inc. is an american company engaged in the development, scale-up, and commercialization of solid-state lithium metal batteries. the company focuses on solid polymer electrolyte technology, which is designed to be flame-resistant, flexible, and suitable for roll-to-roll production and integration with standard li-ion equipment. nuvvon serves the energy storage sector, providing battery solutions for business clients.

quantumscape battery, inc. is an american electronics manufacturer and technology company engaged in the development and production of solid-state lithium-metal batteries for electric vehicles and energy storage applications. the company specializes in solid ceramic electrolyte separators and anode-less cell designs, and collaborates with automotive partners to support the commercialization of its battery technology. quantumscape also conducts research and development in materials science and engineering, and is publicly traded on the nasdaq exchange.
core_offerings: Anode-Less Battery Cell Design and Manufacturing
Advanced Battery Technology Research and Development

description: chongqing taibang new energy co., ltd. (重庆太蓝新能源有限公司) is a chinese company engaged in the research, development, and industrialization of new solid-state lithium batteries and key lithium battery materials. the company serves the automotive, commercial vehicle, and energy storage sectors, targeting business clients. it operates multiple production and research facilities across china, including facilities in beijing, shunyi, chongqing, and anhui.
core_offerings: Lithium Battery Materials Research and Development

description: cidecell is a spanish manufacturer specialized in the production of customized electrodes and cells for lithium-ion batteries, solid-state batteries, sodium-ion batteries, lithium-sulphur batteries, and ultracapacitors. the company serves industries such as aerospace, medical devices, renewable energy, defense, electric vehicles, marine, and related sectors. cidecell also operates as a provider of material manufacturing, oem manufacturing, and battery manufacturing services, and maintains research and development laboratories for materials and characterization. the company emphasizes sustainability through the use of environmentally conscious materials and processes.

basf shanshan battery materials co., ltd, dba basf shanshan battery materials, is a chinese private company operating in the chemicals sector, specializing in the research, development, production, and sales of lithium battery cathode materials. the company serves global markets and operates a research institute focused on product development, experimental verification, analysis, and testing. it also manages two wholly-owned subsidiaries.
core_offerings: Lithium Battery Cathode Materials Sales and Distribution
Battery Material Product Testing and Analysis
Lithium Battery Cathode Materials Research and Development

(香河昆仑新能源材料股份有限公司), known as kunlun new materials (昆仑新材), is a chinese company engaged in the development and production of power-type lithium-ion battery electrolytes. the company operates as a technology enterprise with a focus on solid-state battery technology and serves both domestic and international markets, supplying products for electric vehicles, environmental protection vehicles, and deep-sea submarines. kunlun new materials is certified in environmental management, quality assurance, and occupational health and safety management systems, and holds iatf16949 certification.
core_offerings: Environmental Management Services for Battery Production
Occupational Health and Safety Management Services for Battery Manufacturing
Quality Assurance Services for Battery Materials

description: sepion technologies, inc. is a united states company engaged in materials solutions for the electrify-everything revolution, with a focus on lithium-ion and lithium-metal battery separators. the company operates in the research and product development sector, utilizing nanoscience, polymer chemistry, and machine-learning-driven materials discovery to design and produce coated separator technology for electric vehicle and energy storage applications. sepion technologies collaborates with automakers, cell manufacturers, and component manufacturers to improve battery performance and energy density.
industry_name: All Other Miscellaneous Electrical Equipment and Component Manufacturing

description: mitra chem incorporated is an american private company engaged in the development and manufacturing of lithium-ion battery materials, with a focus on iron-based cathode materials. the company operates in the semiconductor and renewable energy sectors, providing battery materials for electric vehicles, energy storage, and related applications. mitra chem utilizes proprietary machine learning technology to support research and development and manufacturing processes, and its products are used by original equipment manufacturers and battery cell suppliers. the company is also involved in joint development partnerships and has received funding from the us department of energy.
core_offerings: Lithium Iron Phosphate Plus Cathode Manufacturing

description: shenzhen atsm energy co., ltd., dba shenzhen atsm energy, is a chinese company specialized in the research, development, production, and sales of lithium battery materials, lithium-ion battery equipment, and graphene materials. the company serves a global market, focusing on the energy and automotive sectors, and provides products and services including battery materials, equipment, and testing solutions.
core_offerings: Laboratory and Pilot Line Equipment Manufacturing
Battery Electrolyte and Solid Electrolyte Production
Battery Coating and Slitting Materials Manufacturing

description: fengyang pengen technology co., ltd. (阜阳朋能科技有限公司), dba fengyang pengen (阜阳朋能), is a chinese technology company specialized in the research, development, production, and sales of lithium-ion batteries and battery cells, including cathode materials, electrolytes, and battery packs. the company also provides battery leasing services and operates as a vertically integrated manufacturer covering the entire lithium-ion battery manufacturing chain from raw materials to battery packs. fengyang pengen serves sectors such as automotive, construction machinery, energy storage, and two-wheeler industries, and operates a new energy industry research institute, a new material development laboratory, and a material testing center. the company has developed proprietary lithium iron phosphate and ternary battery technologies, and has established subsidiaries in china and the united states.

rusaccum llc (ооо «русаккум»), dba rusaccum (русаккум), is a russian limited liability company specialized in the development of solid-state batteries, with a focus on lithium-ion batteries and solid-state lithium sources. the company operates in the scientific-technical sector, developing technologies to enhance lithium-ion battery efficiency, producing materials for lithium-ion batteries, and designing and supplying lithium-ion battery cells and batteries for specific applications. rusaccum also conducts expert evaluations of materials and batteries using electrochemical testing and collaborates with scientific and educational institutions to address scientific and technological challenges in the green energy sector, hybrid and electric vehicles, and energy storage applications. the company serves both european and russian markets.
core_offerings: Electric and Hybrid Vehicle Battery Solutions

description: nascent materials inc. is an american company engaged in the development and manufacturing of cathode materials for lithium-ion batteries, with a focus on lithium iron phosphate (lfp) and lithium manganese iron phosphate (lmfp) chemistries. the company operates as a manufacturer and technology provider, offering proprietary manufacturing processes that reduce production costs and waste, and are compatible with u.s. feedstocks and recycling inputs. nascent materials serves a global market, with a particular emphasis on the u.s. lithium-ion battery industry and markets such as electric vehicles, grid storage, industrial applications, ai data centers, defense, and aviation.
core_offerings: AI Data Center Battery Material Supply

description: guiyang anda technology energy co., ltd. (贵阳安达科技能源有限公司) is a chinese company engaged in the research, development, production, and sales of phosphate iron lithium batteries, with a focus on lithium-ion battery cathode materials, phosphate iron, and phosphate iron lithium batteries. the company serves the automotive battery power, energy storage, and lead-acid replacement markets, providing battery cell products and battery systems for applications such as electric passenger cars, electric forklifts, electric sightseeing vehicles, and low-speed electric vehicles. anda technology is iso certified and operates a production facility in guiyang, china.
core_offerings: Battery Grade Phosphate Iron Lithium Manufacturing

description: jiangsu hengchuang nano technology co., ltd. (江苏珩创纳米科技有限公司), dba hengchuang (現创), is a chinese technology company specialized in the research, development, production, and sales of lithium battery cathode materials, with a focus on lithium iron phosphate manganese (lmfp) as a replacement for iron in lithium iron phosphate (lfp) to improve voltage and energy density. the company primarily serves the automotive and transportation sectors, including new energy vehicles, electric bicycles, and consumer electronics, targeting major battery manufacturers in these industries. hengchuang has a global presence with patent protection in europe, the united states, japan, and south korea.
core_offerings: Lithium Battery Cathode Material Sales and Distribution
LMFP Cathode Material Sales and Distribution
Lithium Battery Technology Patent Layout Services
Lithium Battery Cathode Material Research and Development
Consumer Electronics Battery Cathode Material Solutions
Electric Bicycle Battery Cathode Material Solutions

description: shanshan new material (finland) oy, known as shanshan technology, is a finnish company engaged in the manufacturing and supply of lithium battery anode materials. the company operates a european production base in vaasa, finland, serving the european market with a focus on sustainable and eco-friendly production practices. its operations include research and development activities related to lithium battery anode materials.
core_offerings: Lithium Battery Anode Materials Research and Development

description: hunan tiantai tianrun new energy technology co., ltd. (湖南天泰天润新能源科技有限公司), dba hunan tiantai tianrun new energy technology (湖南天泰天润新能源科技), is a chinese company specialized in the production of lithium-ion battery cathode material precursors, particularly lithium iron phosphate (lfp), and the recycling and reuse of retired lithium-ion batteries. the company operates as a manufacturer and recycler of lithium-ion battery materials, serving both domestic and international markets. it is iso certified and holds national high-tech enterprise certification. hunan tiantai tianrun new energy technology also engages in research and development activities related to lithium-ion battery materials and collaborates with domestic research institutes and universities.

pt indonesia btr new energy material, dba indonesia btr new energy material, is an indonesian private company operating in the mechanical and industrial engineering sector, specializing in the development, production, and sales of lithium-ion batteries and nano carbon materials such as anode and cathode. the company is engaged in manufacturing activities.

greenbatt technology holding ag is a swiss company engaged in battery technology, with a focus on lithium-ion and solid-state batteries. the company develops and manufactures battery cells using technologies such as thick layer technology and composite cathodes, and supplies battery solutions for industries including electric vehicles, renewable energy storage, and consumer electronics. greenbatt technology also emphasizes sustainability by promoting the recycling and reuse of materials and contributing to the energy transition.
core_offerings: Battery Cell Recycling and Material Reuse Solutions

description: you shan new materials technology co., ltd. (浙江友山新材料科技有限公司), known as you shan technology (友山科技), is a chinese company engaged in the research, development, production, and sales of lithium-ion battery materials, with a focus on phosphate iron lithium and related cathode materials for new energy vehicles, public and household energy storage, and other lithium-ion battery applications. the company operates as a manufacturer and distributor within the lithium-ion battery materials industry, and maintains a comprehensive product lifecycle service system. it also collaborates with upstream and downstream industry partners to support its supply chain and has established phosphate iron lithium production bases in inner mongolia, guangxi, and yunnan, with plans for international expansion.
core_offerings: Lithium-Ion Battery Material Research and Development
Lithium-Ion Battery Material Sales and Distribution
New Energy Vehicle Battery Material Supply

description: refire_ev is an indian company operating in the oil and energy sector, specializing in the development and supply of electric vehicle charging infrastructure and lithium ion battery technology. the company also provides electrical vehicle chargers and ev lithium ion batteries along with their accessories.

stratus materials inc. is a u.s. company engaged in the development and manufacturing of manganese-rich, cobalt-free cathode active materials for lithium-ion batteries. the company focuses on proprietary formulations and production processes to address stability challenges in lithium manganese-rich cathode chemistries, with applications in light- to medium-duty electric vehicles, energy storage, and related battery technologies. stratus materials also provides materials solutions for battery manufacturers and original equipment manufacturers, supporting the sustainable development of electric vehicle batteries.

zakuro, inc., dba zakuro, is an american company engaged in the development and manufacturing of solid-state lithium batteries, with a focus on technologies that utilize lithium metal anodes. the company operates within the semiconductor industry, with activities in hardware and renewable energy semiconductor manufacturing, and serves sectors such as energy storage, automotive, and consumer electronics. zakuro also develops battery technologies that aim to improve energy density and safety compared to traditional lithium-ion batteries.

jiangsu xinliyuan technology co., ltd. (江苏新锂元科技有限公司), dba xinliyuan (新锂元), is a chinese technology company specialized in the research, development, and production of solid-state lithium batteries, salt lake lithium extraction, and comprehensive recycling of lithium battery materials. the company primarily serves the lithium battery and new energy industries, focusing on solid-state electrolyte materials and lithium battery raw materials. xinliyuan operates multiple research centers in beijing and henan and has completed over 470 project research results, serving clients across multiple provinces and cities nationwide.
core_offerings: Lithium Battery Material Project Research Services
Lithium Battery Material Supply Chain Solutions
Solid-State Lithium Battery Research and Development
